summary: Second production-layer skill. Consumes encoded brand intelligence + optional chosen angle from a previous produce-paid-angles run, produces a copywriter brief (800-1200 words structured doc per audience × angle × channel). Verbatim-anchored throughout, operator-format-respected, per-channel adapted (Meta vs Email vs Landing vs TikTok). 8-step pipeline: resolve audience+angle+channel → read encoded data → verbatim density floor check → map sections per voc-coding lenses → hook variants generation (4-tier anchor priority) → brief composition → Layer A trace + Layer B artifact → finalize-mutation-batch. 4 focus modes (default / hooks / objections / ctas / fresh). Encodes the v2.10.0 lesson: brief artifact never pasted twice (write to file, surface synthesis only in chat).

changes.reason: Producer Sonnet, subagent_safe. 8-step pipeline, 4 focus modes, 15 Hard Rules. Brief structure preference resolved from operator/profile.json#preferences.brief_format with brand override. Default channel inferred from operator stack + brand current_focus, fallback AskUserQuestion. 425 lines.

operator_impact: Natural chain from paid-angles cascade to copy-brief on the chosen angle. Brief format respects operator preference (or brand-specific override). Channel inferred from operator stack — never hardcoded Meta-as-default. Brief written to artifact file (not pasted in chat), synthesis surfaced inline, reasoned next-step close per no-orphan doctrine.
tested_on: phantom-stress sync — an early-stage DTC pilot ready for live test (voc encoded + paid-angles v2.10.0 produced 'Miroir post-grossesse' angle ranked top, natural cascade target)
caught_by: Roadmap cascade #2 after produce-paid-angles. 5 architectural decisions encoded (Largo S39 batch triage): brief structure = profile preference + brand override, default channel = inferred not hardcoded, hook examples = 3 hook-only (body opening = copywriter's job), brief length 800-1200 / 1500 ceiling, multi-offer = active offer inline in CTAs (never enumerate).
known_gaps: Live test deferred to next session.
Sister production skills (landing/email/post) not yet shipped — extend on demand only.
